APP GOALDesign a **mobile web application UI** for hotel housekeeping staff to quickly report room cleaning status.App characteristics:* Extremely simple* Elderly-friendly* Large buttons, readable text* Linear flow only* No login* No side menu / no tab bar* Internal enterprise utility app* Optimized for mobile browserPrimary use case:```Nhập mã phòng → Take photos → Record voice → Submit → Success```---## 2. USER FLOW (MANDATORY)```Open App→ Room Input Screen→ Camera Capture Screen→ Room Report Screen→ Success Screen→ Back to Room Input Screen```Rules:* One main action per screen* Auto navigation when possible* No branching navigation* No dashboard---## 3. SCREEN FEATURES---### SCREEN 1 – NHẬP MÃ PHÒNG**Purpose:** Identify room by manual input**UI Elements*** Page title: "Nhập mã phòng"* Large text input field (centered, prominent)  * Placeholder: "VD: 401"  * Font size lớn (24px+), dễ đọc  * Border radius: 16px  * Height: 56px  * Text align: center  * Input type: text (hỗ trợ cả số và chữ, ví dụ "401", "P401", "VIP01")  * Auto-focus khi vào màn hình* Numpad / keyboard hiển thị tự động* Instruction text below input: "Nhập số phòng hoặc mã phòng trên cửa"* Primary CTA button: **"Tiếp tục"**  * Disabled state khi input trống  * Enabled state khi có ≥1 ký tự**Behavior*** User nhập mã phòng → nhấn "Tiếp tục" → navigate to Camera Screen* Validate: input không được trống* Error → toast "Vui lòng nhập mã phòng"* Trim whitespace trước khi submit* Optional: Hiển thị danh sách gợi ý phòng (nếu có API)---### SCREEN 2 – CAMERA CAPTURE**Purpose:** Capture proof photos**UI Elements*** Header title: "PHÒNG 401" (hiển thị mã phòng đã nhập)* Subtitle: "Chụp ảnh sau khi dọn"* Large camera view* Big shutter button center bottom* Counter: `1 / 3`* Thumbnail preview row* Optional "Tiếp tục" button if < 3 photos**Rules*** Allow **1–3 photos*** At 3 photos → auto navigate Report* User can delete and retake---### SCREEN 3 – ROOM REPORT**Purpose:** Voice report + submit**UI Elements*** Header card: "PHÒNG 401" (hiển thị mã phòng đã nhập)* Image list card (horizontal)* **Voice recording card (MAIN FOCUS)*** Optional small text input fallback* Sticky bottom CTA: "GỬI BÁO CÁO"**Voice Recording*** Large microphone button* Recording state label* Convert speech → text* Editable text**Validation*** Must have ≥1 image* Room ID required (đã nhập từ Screen 1)---### SCREEN 4 – SUCCESS**Purpose:** Confirmation**UI Elements*** Large success icon* Title: "Gửi báo cáo thành công"* Subtitle: Hiển thị mã phòng vừa báo cáo (VD: "Phòng 401 đã được ghi nhận")* Button: "Bắt đầu phòng mới"**Behavior*** Button → Room Input Screen* Optional auto redirect after 2–3 seconds---## 4. from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from app.models.report import HousekeepingReport
from app.schemas.report import ReportCreate


def create_report(db: Session, data: ReportCreate) -> HousekeepingReport:
    report = HousekeepingReport(
        room_code=data.room_code.strip().upper(),
        voice_note=data.voice_note,
        image_urls=data.image_urls,
    )
    db.add(report)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(report)
    return report


def get_reports(db: Session, room_code: str | None = None, limit: int = 50) -> list[HousekeepingReport]:
    query = db.query(HousekeepingReport).order_by(HousekeepingReport.submitted_at.desc())
    if room_code:
        query = query.filter(HousekeepingReport.room_code == room_code.strip().upper())
    return query.limit(limit).all()

Both servers are running. Here's a summary of everything built:

---

## Done — Housekeeping Report App

### Backend (`http://localhost:2701`)
| File | What it does |
|---|---|
| `models/report.py` | `HousekeepingReport` SQLAlchemy model |
| `schemas/report.py` | `ReportCreate` / `ReportResponse` Pydantic schemas |
| `services/report.py` | `create_report`, `get_reports` logic |
| `api/routes/report.py` | `POST /api/reports` + `GET /api/reports` |
| `database/002_housekeeping_reports.sql` | MySQL migration (already applied) |

### Frontend (`http://localhost:8386`)
4-screen SPA — one fixed screen active at a time, no routing library:

| Screen | Trigger |
|---|---|
| **1 – Nhập mã phòng** | Auto-focused input, "Tiếp tục" enables on any input |
| **2 – Chụp ảnh** | Camera via `getUserMedia`, capture up to 3 photos, auto-advance at 3 |
| **3 – Báo cáo phòng** | Thumbnail strip, mic button uses Web Speech API (vi-VN), editable textarea, "GỬI BÁO CÁO" uploads to S3 then POSTs to backend |
| **4 – Thành công** | Pop-in animation, shows room code + timestamp, "Bắt đầu phòng mới" resets |

### Design
- Font: **Nunito** (round, warm, elderly-friendly)
- Colors: spec-compliant `#4A90FF` primary, `#E8F4FF` cards, clean white surfaces
- Large touch targets (52–80px buttons), 32px room input text
- Desktop centers to 430px with shadow; mobile full-screen

### Manual test checklist
1. Open `http://localhost:8386` on phone or mobile Chrome DevTools
2. Enter a room code → tap Tiếp tục
3. Allow camera → take 1–3 photos (or tap ✕ to delete/retake)
4. Tap mic → speak in Vietnamese → tap again to stop
5. Tap GỬI BÁO CÁO — if S3 is not configured, upload will fail; you can test by mocking `uploadPhotos` or wiring up S3 env vars in `.env`
